cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out who Claire ends up dancing with after all these partner swaps. Let's start by listing the initial pairs. The starting pairs are: - Alice with Lola - Bob with Izzi - Claire with Sam - Dave with Patrick - Eve with Karl So the initial state is: Alice - Lola Bob - Izzi Claire - Sam Dave - Patrick Eve - Karl Now, the problem says there are several partner switches. Let me go through each one step by step. First switch: Claire and Bob switch partners. So Claire's partner was Sam, and Bob's partner was Izzi. After switching, Claire will be with Izzi, and Bob will be with Sam. Let me update the pairs: After first switch: Alice - Lola Bob - Sam Claire - Izzi Dave - Patrick Eve - Karl Second switch: Claire and Alice switch partners. Claire is currently with Izzi, and Alice is with Lola. After switching, Claire will take Alice's partner (Lola), and Alice will take Claire's partner (Izzi). So now: After second switch: Alice - Izzi Bob - Sam Claire -
